hooks.command: if [ -d .sdd ]; then ACTIVE=$(find .sdd -name state.yaml -exec grep -l 'current_stage:' {} \; 2>/dev/null | while read f; do STAGE=$(grep 'current_stage:' "$f" | awk '{print $2}'); if [ "$STAGE" != 'DONE' ]; then DIR=$(dirname "$f" | xargs basename); TASK=$(grep 'current_task:' "$f" | awk '{print $2}'); TOTAL=$(grep 'total_tasks:' "$f" | awk '{print $2}'); echo "  - $DIR: $STAGE (Task $TASK/$TOTAL)"; fi; done); if [ -n "$ACTIVE" ]; then echo "SDD: 检测到未完成的需求:"; echo "$ACTIVE"; echo "执行 /sdd 继续，/sdd list 查看全部。"; fi; fi

if [ -d .sdd ]; then find .sdd -maxdepth 2 -name state.yaml 2>/dev/null | while read f; do if grep -q 'current_stage: TDD_IMPL' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'SDD: TDD 模式 — 确保先写测试再写实现'; break; fi; done; fi
